sections.title: Shared starting
Talking to Reldo

lines.speaker: Reldo
lines.text: Hello, stranger.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello there! The name's [player name]. Who are you?

lines.speaker: Reldo
lines.text: My name is Reldo. I'm the palace librarian.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ah, that explains why you're in the library then.

lines.speaker: Reldo
lines.text: Well, truth be told, I would probably be here even if it wasn't where I worked. I very much like reading, not to mention sharing what I learn with all who are interested.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sounds like a very noble goal!

lines.speaker: Reldo
lines.text: Hello there, [player name].

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm in search of a quest.

lines.speaker: Reldo
lines.text: Hmm... I don't believe there are any here.

lines.speaker: Reldo
lines.text: Let me think actually...

lines.speaker: Reldo
lines.text: Ah, yes. I think I have something, if you're definitely interested?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Of course.

lines.speaker: Reldo
lines.text: Well, if you look around for book called The Shield of Arrav, you'll find a quest in there.

lines.speaker: Reldo
lines.text: I'm not sure where the book is mind you... but I'm sure it's around here somewhere.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Great! Thank you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Actually, I don't think I am. Goodbye.

sections.title: Talking to Reldo before finding the book

lines.speaker: Reldo
lines.text: Hello there, [player name].

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: About that book... Where is it again?

lines.speaker: Reldo
lines.text: I'm not sure exactly... but I'm sure it's around here somewhere.

sections.title: Searching the right bookcase

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Aha! Exactly what I was looking for.

sections.title: Talking to Reldo before reading the book

lines.speaker: Reldo
lines.text: Hello there, [player name].

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I found that book.

lines.speaker: Reldo
lines.text: Very good. I suggest you give it a read.

sections.title: Talking to Reldo after reading the book

lines.speaker: Reldo
lines.text: Hello there, [player name].

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay, I've read that book about the Shield of Arrav.

lines.speaker: Reldo
lines.text: Then perhaps you now have your quest?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I think I do. Do you know where I can find the Phoenix Gang or the Black Arm Gang?

lines.speaker: Reldo
lines.text: No, I don't. However, I hear Baraek, the fur trader in the market, has had connections with the Phoenix Gang.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: And the Black Arm Gang?

lines.speaker: Reldo
lines.text: There are rumours that they are based in the south west corner of the city. Charlie the Tramp might be able to tell you more. He knows that part of Varrock well.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks! I'll get to it!

lines.speaker: Reldo
lines.text: Good luck.

sections.title: Black Arm Gang
Talking to Charlie the Tramp

lines.speaker: Charlie the Tramp
lines.text: Spare some change, guv?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm looking for the Black Arm Gang.

lines.speaker: Charlie the Tramp
lines.text: Funny you should mention that... Rumour has it that they have their headquarters right down this alleyway. Though if I were you, I'd be careful about messing with them...

lines.speaker: Charlie the Tramp
lines.text: Like I told you, the rumour is that they have their headquarters right down this alleyway. Though if I were you, I'd be careful about messing with them...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you think they would let me join?

lines.speaker: Charlie the Tramp
lines.text: You never know. You'll find a lady down there called Katrine. Speak to her. But whatever you do, don't upset her.

sections.title: Talking to Katrine

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What is this place?

lines.speaker: Katrine
lines.text: It's a private business. Can I help you at all?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've heard you're the Black Arm Gang.

lines.speaker: Katrine
lines.text: Who told you that?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd rather not reveal my sources.

lines.speaker: Katrine
lines.text: Hmm... I suppose I can understand that. So, say we were the Black Arm Gang, what would you want with us?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I want to become a member of your gang.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I want some hints on becoming a thief.

lines.speaker: Katrine
lines.text: Do you now? And what makes you think I'll provide anything like that?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, how about I become a member of your gang in return?

lines.speaker: Katrine
lines.text: How unusual... Okay, let's say we are who you believe we are. Do you think we'd be recruiting people who just waltz in here saying 'hello, I'd like to play'?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't know. What would be the alternative?

lines.speaker: Katrine
lines.text: Watching local thugs and thieves in action, perhaps? How do I know I can just trust someone who's wandered in here.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, you can give me a try can't you?

lines.speaker: Katrine
lines.text: I'm not so sure...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, people tell me I have an honest face.

lines.speaker: Katrine
lines.text: Someone honest wanting to join a gang of thieves? Excuse me if I remain unconvinced...

lines.speaker: Katrine
lines.text: Thinking about it... I may have a solution actually. You may have heard of the Phoenix Gang. I hear they have a very nice weapons stash not too far from here.

lines.speaker: Katrine
lines.text: We're fresh out of crossbows, but apparently they have plenty. If someone were to aquire a couple for us, it would be very much appreciated.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sounds simple enough. Any particular reason you need them?

lines.speaker: Katrine
lines.text: Let's just say there's a local merchant who is refusing to pay some very reasonable 'keep-your-life-pleasant' insurance rates.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So you're planning to murder him?

lines.speaker: Katrine
lines.text: Him? No. However, I hear that the local law might soon be finding a crossbow belonging to the Phoenix Gang in his home...

lines.speaker: Katrine
lines.text: I also hear that a similar type of crossbow might soon be used in a murder on the other side of the city...

lines.speaker: Katrine
lines.text: Now, are you going to keep asking questions, or are you going to go get those crossbows?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay, no problem.

lines.speaker: Katrine
lines.text: Great! Apparently the Phoenix Gang's weapons stash is somewhere to the east. Ask that tramp outside. I'm sure he'll know more.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sounds a little tricky. Got anything easier?

lines.speaker: Katrine
lines.text: If you're not up for a little bit of danger, I don't think you've got anything to offer us.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay, I'll do it.

lines.speaker: Katrine
lines.text: Great! Apparently the Phoenix Gang's weapons stash is somewhere to the east. Ask that tramp outside. I'm sure he'll know more.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: It's a no from me then.

lines.speaker: Katrine
lines.text: Then get lost!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm looking for the door out of here.

lines.speaker: Katrine
lines.text: Try... the one you just came through?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: It was Charlie, the tramp outside.

lines.speaker: Katrine
lines.text: Is that guy still out there? He's getting to be a nuisance. Might be time for him to have a little accident...

lines.speaker: Katrine
lines.text: Anyway, say we were the Black Arm Gang, what would you want with us?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Everyone knows. It's no great secret.

lines.speaker: Katrine
lines.text: What?! You must be joking!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh no, not at all... It's so obvious! Even the town guard have caught on...

lines.speaker: Katrine
lines.text: I see... Well... say we were the Black Arm Gang, what would you want with us?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What sort of business?

lines.speaker: Katrine
lines.text: A small, family business. We give financial advice to other companies. Now, if you'll excuse me.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm looking for fame and riches.

lines.speaker: Katrine
lines.text: And you expect to find that up the back streets of Varrock? Keep dreaming.

sections.title: Attempting to enter the Black Arm Gang hideout before joining
Talking to Charlie the Tramp after accepting Katrine's task

lines.speaker: Charlie the Tramp
lines.text: Spare some change, guv?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Any idea where the Phoenix Gang are based?

lines.speaker: Charlie the Tramp
lines.text: Sure, I know everything there is to know about this city. I'd be happy to tell you for ten coins.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay, that sounds fair.

lines.speaker: Charlie the Tramp
lines.text: Perfect! Now listen closely. The Phoenix Gang can be found east of here. Take the southern alley past the Blue Moon Inn and look for a building owned by the VTAM corporation.

lines.speaker: Charlie the Tramp
lines.text: Their main hideout is in that building, with their weapon stash being two buildings east of it. Good luck getting into either without being a member of their gang though.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Without being a member of their gang? That might be problematic.

lines.speaker: Charlie the Tramp
lines.text: Well, your best bet would probably be to find someone who isn't a member of the Black Arm Gang and get them to infiltrate the ranks of the Phoenix Gang for you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Someone? Like who?

lines.speaker: Charlie the Tramp
lines.text: There's plenty of other adventurers about besides yourself. I'm sure if you asked one of them nicely they would help you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I see...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ten coins? That's too much! I'll give you five.

lines.speaker: Charlie the Tramp
lines.text: I guess that'll have to do then.

lines.speaker: Charlie the Tramp
lines.text: Great, thanks.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So where can I find the Phoenix Gang then?

lines.speaker: Charlie the Tramp
lines.text: If you pay me five more coins, I'll tell you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That's not fair, but I guess I don't have a choice.

lines.speaker: Charlie the Tramp
lines.text: Perfect! Now listen closely. The Phoenix Gang can be found east of here. Take the southern alley past the Blue Moon Inn and look for a building owned by the VTAM corporation.

lines.speaker: Charlie the Tramp
lines.text: Their main hideout is in that building, with their weapon stash being two buildings east of it. Good luck getting into either without being a member of their gang though.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Without being a member of their gang? That might be problematic.

lines.speaker: Charlie the Tramp
lines.text: Well, your best bet would probably be to find someone who isn't a member of the Black Arm Gang and get them to infiltrate the ranks of the Phoenix Gang for you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Someone? Like who?

lines.speaker: Charlie the Tramp
lines.text: There's plenty of other adventurers about besides yourself. I'm sure if you asked one of them nicely they would help you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I see...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You thieving gutter-scum! You'd better watch your back!

lines.speaker: Charlie the Tramp
lines.text: Yeah, sure, whatever. You don't frighten me, pal.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Never mind. I'll find it myself.

lines.speaker: Charlie the Tramp
lines.text: Well, you know where to find me if you get lost!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Any idea where the Phoenix Gang are based?

lines.speaker: Charlie the Tramp
lines.text: Well, given you paid up, I guess I can remind you. The Phoenix Gang can be found east of here. Take the southern alley past the Blue Moon Inn and look for a building owned by the VTAM corporation.

lines.speaker: Charlie the Tramp
lines.text: Their main hideout is in that building, with their weapon stash being two buildings east of it. Good luck getting into either without being a member of their gang though.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Without being a member of their gang? That might be problematic.

lines.speaker: Charlie the Tramp
lines.text: Well, your best bet would probably be to find someone who isn't a member of the Black Arm Gang and get them to infiltrate the ranks of the Phoenix Gang for you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Someone? Like who?

lines.speaker: Charlie the Tramp
lines.text: There's plenty of other adventurers about besides yourself. I'm sure if you asked one of them nicely they would help you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I see...

sections.title: Talking to Katrine again after accepting her task

lines.speaker: Katrine
lines.text: Have you got those crossbows for me yet?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, I haven't found them yet. Do you know where I should be looking.

lines.speaker: Katrine
lines.text: Apparently the Phoenix Gang's weapons stash is somewhere to the east. Ask that tramp outside. I'm sure he'll know more.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have one...

lines.speaker: Katrine
lines.text: Well, I need two. Come back when you have them.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, I have.

lines.speaker: Katrine
lines.text: It seems you're more skilled than I originally gave you credit for. Well done. Consider yourself a member of the Black Arm Gang. I'd suggest you now go and familiarise yourself with the rest of the ganghouse.

sections.title: Talking to Katrine after joining the Black Arm Gang

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hey.

lines.speaker: Katrine
lines.text: Hey.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So I'm part of the gang now?

lines.speaker: Katrine
lines.text: You are. Feel free to familiarise yourself with the rest of the ganghouse.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Will do! Thanks!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Who are all those people in there?

lines.speaker: Katrine
lines.text: They're just various rogues and thieves.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: They don't say a lot...

lines.speaker: Katrine
lines.text: Nope.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Teach me to be a top class criminal.

lines.speaker: Katrine
lines.text: Teach yourself.

sections.title: Searching the Black Arm Gang's cupboard

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: This must be the Shield of Arrav! Well... half of it at least. I wonder where the other half is...

sections.title: Talking to Straven after joining the Black Arm Gang

lines.speaker: Straven
lines.text: Stay away from here! Black Arm dog!

sections.title: Attempting to enter the weapon supply depot without the key
Talking to the Weaponsmaster

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello.

lines.speaker: Weaponsmaster
lines.text: Hey! Who are you? I'm gonna teach you not to stick your nose where it don't belong!

sections.title: Attempting to take a Phoenix crossbow

lines.speaker: Weaponsmaster
lines.text: Stop! Thief!

sections.title: Talking to Reldo with half of the shield

lines.speaker: Reldo
lines.text: Hello there, [player name].

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've found half of the Shield of Arrav!

lines.speaker: Reldo
lines.text: Half?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes. It seems it was split in two.

lines.speaker: Reldo
lines.text: I see... Where did you find this half?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: The Black Arm Gang had it. I managed to infiltrate their gang and steal it from them.

lines.speaker: Reldo
lines.text: A split gang and a split shield. My guess would be that the other gang has the other half.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, I did have a member of the Phoenix Gang help me... Maybe they can find the other half.

lines.speaker: Reldo
lines.text: Let's hope so. In the meantime, you should probably head over to the museum so they can verify the authenticity of this half.

sections.title: Phoenix Gang
Talking to Baraek

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you tell me where I can find the Phoenix Gang?

lines.speaker: Baraek
lines.text: Shh, shh, shh! Not so loud! You don't want to get me in trouble, do you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So I take it that you do know where they are.

lines.speaker: Baraek
lines.text: I may do... but I don't want to get into trouble for revealing their hideout. Of course, if I was, say 20 coins richer, I may happen to be more inclined to take that sort of risk...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay. Have 20 gold coins.

lines.speaker: Baraek
lines.text: Okay, to get to the gang hideout, head to the southern gates of the city and then head down the alleyway past the Blue Moon Inn.

lines.speaker: Baraek
lines.text: Down there you'll find a building owned by the VTAM corporation. That's where you'll find the Phoenix Gang. Just be careful. They ain't the types to be messed about.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Uh... oops. I don't actually have 20 coins. Silly me.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, I don't do things like bribery.

lines.speaker: Baraek
lines.text: If you wanna deal with the Phoenix Gang, they're involved in much worse than a bit of bribery.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, I'd like to be 20 coins richer too.

sections.title: Talking to Straven or attempting to open the door

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What's through that door?

lines.speaker: Straven
lines.text: You can't go in there. Only authorised personnel of the VTAM Corporation are allowed beyond this point.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I know who you are!

lines.speaker: Straven
lines.text: Really? Well? Who are we then?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: This is the headquarters of one of the most dangerous crime syndicates this city has ever seen! The Phoenix Gang!

lines.speaker: Straven
lines.text: No, this is a legitimate business run by legitimate individuals. However... supposing we were this crime gang, what would you want with us?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd like to offer you my services.

lines.speaker: Straven
lines.text: You mean you'd like to join the Phoenix Gang? Well, obviously I can't speak for them, but the Phoenix Gang doesn't let people join just like that. First, you'd need to prove your loyalty.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How would I go about doing that?

lines.speaker: Straven
lines.text: Obviously, I would have no idea. Although, having said that, a rival gang of ours, er, theirs, called the Black Arm Gang is supposedly meeting a contact from Port Sarim today.

lines.speaker: Straven
lines.text: Apparently the meeting is going to take place in the Blue Moon Inn, and supposedly the contact is none other than the notorious mass murderer turned pirate captain, Jonny the Beard.

lines.speaker: Straven
lines.text: Now, obviously I know nothing about the dealings of the Phoenix Gang, but I bet if somebody were to arrange an accident for Jonny and bring back his intelligence report, the gang would be very pleased.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I see... I'm sure I can help sort something out for them. I'll get right on it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I want nothing. I was just making sure you were them.

lines.speaker: Straven
lines.text: Well then get lost and stop wasting my time.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How do I get a job with the VTAM corporation?

lines.speaker: Straven
lines.text: Get a copy of the Varrock Herald. If we have any positions right now, they'll be advertised in there.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Fair enough.

sections.title: Talking to Straven or opening the door after accepting his task

lines.speaker: Straven
lines.text: How's your little mission going?

lines.speaker: Straven
lines.text: How's your little mission going?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't have it yet...

lines.speaker: Straven
lines.text: Jonny the Beard is the person who has it. I imagine he will be in the Blue Moon Inn... Not that I'd know for sure, with me definitely not being a member of the Phoenix Gang and all.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have the intelligence report!

lines.speaker: Straven
lines.text: Let's see it then.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Let me go get it from the bank.

lines.speaker: Straven
lines.text: I'll wait here.

lines.speaker: Straven
lines.text: Very good... Very good... Okay, I'm satisfied. Welcome to the Phoenix Gang! I'm Straven, one of the gang leaders.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Nice to meet you. I'm [player name].

lines.speaker: Straven
lines.text: As a member of our gang, you now have access to our hideout and our weapons supply depot. The hideout is just through this door and the depot is two doors down from here. You'll need this key to get in.

lines.speaker: Straven
lines.text: Once again, welcome to the Phoenix Gang!

sections.title: Talking to Straven after joining the Phoenix Gang

lines.speaker: Straven
lines.text: Greetings, fellow gang member.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've heard you've got some cool treasures in this place.

lines.speaker: Straven
lines.text: Oh yeah, we've all stolen some stuff in our time. Our candlesticks down here, for example, were quite a challenge to get out of the palace.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: And the Shield of Arrav?

lines.speaker: Straven
lines.text: Woah... that's a blast from the past! We stole that years and years ago!

lines.speaker: Straven
lines.text: Truth be told, we don't even have the whole shield anymore. A few years ago there was a big fight within the gang and the shield got broken in half as a result.

lines.speaker: Straven
lines.text: After the fight, some gang members split off and formed their own group. They took one half of the shield with them.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: This other group? The Black Arm Gang?

lines.speaker: Straven
lines.text: Indeed.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Any suggestions for where I can go thieving?

lines.speaker: Straven
lines.text: You could always try the marketplace over in Ardougne. Lots of opportunity there!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Where's the Black Arm Gang hideout?

lines.speaker: Straven
lines.text: Interested in spying on the enemy, are you? It will be tricky. Their security is pretty good. Not as good as ours obviously, but still good.

lines.speaker: Straven
lines.text: Still, if you really want to go there, it's down an alleyway near the southern gate. One of our contacts, a tramp going by the name of Charlie, keeps an eye on it. He may be able to help you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I see. Thanks for the help!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd better get going.

sections.title: Talking to Straven after losing the weapon store key

lines.speaker: Straven
lines.text: Greetings, fellow gang member.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm afraid I lost that key you gave me...

lines.speaker: Straven
lines.text: You really need to be more careful. We don't want that key falling into the wrong hands. Have this spare, but don't lose it this time!

sections.title: Searching the Phoenix Gang's chest
Talking to the Weaponsmaster after joining the Phoenix Gang

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello.

lines.speaker: Weaponsmaster
lines.text: Hello fellow Phoenix! What are you after?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm after a weapon or two.

lines.speaker: Weaponsmaster
lines.text: No problem. Feel free to look around.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm looking for treasure.

lines.speaker: Weaponsmaster
lines.text: Aren't we all? We've not got any up here. Go mug someone somewhere if you want some treasure.

sections.title: Attempting to take a Phoenix crossbow after joining the Phoenix Gang

lines.speaker: Weaponsmaster
lines.text: Hey! That's Straven's! He won't like you messing with that!

sections.title: Learning the location of the Black Arm gang from Charlie the Tramp

lines.speaker: Charlie the Tramp
lines.text: Spare some change, guv?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm looking for the Black Arm Gang.

lines.speaker: Charlie the Tramp
lines.text: Like I told you, the rumour is that they have their headquarters right down this alleyway. Though if I were you, I'd be careful about messing with them...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you think they would let me join?

lines.speaker: Charlie the Tramp
lines.text: No. You're a collaborator with the Phoenix Gang. There's no way they'll let you join.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How did you know I was in the Phoenix Gang?

lines.speaker: Charlie the Tramp
lines.text: I've been known to have dealings with the Phoenix Gang. I wouldn't be very good at my job if I didn't know their members.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I see. So, any ideas how I could get in there?

lines.speaker: Charlie the Tramp
lines.text: Your best bet would probably be to find someone who isn't a member of the Phoenix Gang and get them to infiltrate the ranks of the Black Arm Gang for you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Someone? Like who?

lines.speaker: Charlie the Tramp
lines.text: There's plenty of other adventurers about besides yourself. I'm sure if you asked one of them nicely they would help you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I see...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Any ideas how I could get in there then?

lines.speaker: Charlie the Tramp
lines.text: Your best bet would probably be to find someone who isn't a member of the Phoenix Gang and get them to infiltrate the ranks of the Black Arm Gang for you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Someone? Like who?

lines.speaker: Charlie the Tramp
lines.text: There's plenty of other adventurers about besides yourself. I'm sure if you asked one of them nicely they would help you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I see...

sections.title: Talking to Katrine after joining the Phoenix Gang

lines.speaker: Katrine
lines.text: You've got some guts coming here, Phoenix scum! Get lost, or I'll make sure you haven't got those guts anymore!

sections.title: Attempting to enter deeper into the Black Arm Gang base as a Phoenix Gang member
Talking to Reldo with half of the shield

lines.speaker: Reldo
lines.text: Hello there, [player name].

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've found half of the Shield of Arrav!

lines.speaker: Reldo
lines.text: Half?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes. It seems it was split in two.

lines.speaker: Reldo
lines.text: I see... Where did you find this half?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: The Phoenix Gang had it. I managed to infiltrate their gang and steal it from them.

lines.speaker: Reldo
lines.text: A split gang and a split shield. My guess would be that the other gang has the other half.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, I don't think I'll have much luck infiltrating the Black Arm Gang now that I've joined their rivals, but maybe someone else will be able to.

lines.speaker: Reldo
lines.text: Let's hope so. In the meantime, you should probably head over to the museum so they can verify the authenticity of this half.

sections.title: Tradeable items
Inspecting a weapon store key
Inspecting a Phoenix crossbow
Inspecting a certificate half
Inspecting a certificate half while having both pieces
Using a tradeable quest item on another player
Finishing up
Talking to Curator Haig Halen

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello there. I'm here about the Shield of Arrav.

lines.speaker: Curator Haig Halen
lines.text: The Shield of Arrav? The Museum has been searching for that for years! The late King Roald II offered a generous reward for its return!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, I'm here to claim it.

lines.speaker: Curator Haig Halen
lines.text: You've found the shield? Let's have a look!

lines.speaker: Curator Haig Halen
lines.text: This is incredible! But where's the other half?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I obtained this half from the [Phoenix Gang/Black Arm Gang]. The [Black Arm Gang/Phoenix Gang] might have the other half.

lines.speaker: Curator Haig Halen
lines.text: That does sound plausible. We will have to hope that another adventurer can recover that half.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So will I be rewarded for recovering half of the shield?

lines.speaker: Curator Haig Halen
lines.text: I'm afraid the reward is for the recovery of the full shield. However, what I'll do is write you out two half- certificates. If another adventurer returns the other shield half, I'll do the same for them.

lines.speaker: Curator Haig Halen
lines.text: The two of you can then swap one of the half- certificates to make a full one each. Take that to the King and he will grant you your reward.

sections.title: Talking to the Curator again after giving him the shield half

lines.speaker: Curator Haig Halen
lines.text: Welcome to the museum of Varrock.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello there. I'm here about the Shield of Arrav.

lines.speaker: Curator Haig Halen
lines.text: I gave you two half-certificates for the half you returned. If another adventurer returns the other shield half, I'll do the same for them.

lines.speaker: Curator Haig Halen
lines.text: The two of you can then swap one of the half-certificates to make a full one each. Take that to the King and he will grant you your reward.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Would it be okay to get more half-certificates?

lines.speaker: Curator Haig Halen
lines.text: I suppose so. It's not like you can do anything with them without the other half.

sections.title: Talking to King Roald without a full certificate

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Greetings, your majesty.

lines.speaker: King Roald
lines.text: Yes, citizen. Do you need something?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm here about the Shield of Arrav.

lines.speaker: King Roald
lines.text: The Shield of Arrav? Yes, I do recall my father put a reward out for that.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, I've managed to find half the shield!

lines.speaker: King Roald
lines.text: You have? Well, before we go any further, you'll need to get the authenticity of the shield verified by the curator at the museum.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay. I'll head over there.

lines.speaker: King Roald
lines.text: I'm afraid that's only half the reward certificate. You'll have to get the other half and join them together if you want to claim the reward.

sections.title: Talking to King Roald with a full certificate

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Greetings, your majesty.

lines.speaker: King Roald
lines.text: Yes, citizen. Do you need something?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm here about the Shield of Arrav.

lines.speaker: King Roald
lines.text: My goodness! This is for the reward offered by my father many years ago! I never thought I would live to see the day when someone came forward to claim it!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: It was quite the undertaking. I wouldn't have been able to do it without help from a fellow adventurer.

lines.speaker: King Roald
lines.text: Well, in that case, it's only right that you both be rewarded. I will grant half of the reward to you and half to your companion. That means 600 coins for you. Enjoy it! You've very much earned it!

sections.title: Post-quest
Talking to Straven as a member of the Phoenix Gang

lines.speaker: Straven
lines.text: Greetings, fellow gang member.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've heard you've got some cool treasures in this place.

lines.speaker: Straven
lines.text: Oh yeah, we've all stolen some stuff in our time. Our candlesticks down here, for example, were quite a challenge to get out of the palace.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: And the Shield of Arrav?

lines.speaker: Straven
lines.text: Once one of our most prized possessions.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Once?

lines.speaker: Straven
lines.text: It seems the Black Arm Gang weren't content with having one half. They recently stole the other half of the shield from us as well!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh no! I'll be sure to keep an eye out for any of their members sneaking around.

sections.title: If you lost the weapon store key
Talking to Katrine as a member of the Black Arm Gang

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hey.

lines.speaker: Katrine
lines.text: Hey.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So I'm part of the gang now?

lines.speaker: Katrine
lines.text: You are, but don't make me regret it. In case you didn't hear, someone recently stole something very important from us. We need to be more careful about who we let in.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Imagine doing something like that!
